summary: Backend (17/17 pytest passed) + frontend e2e (home, projects, experiences, contact submit, admin login + 3 tabs) all working. Portfolio for Kyllian Le Guen is functional end-to-end.

minor.issue: In-memory token store — tokens lost on backend restart. Acceptable for single-user admin per agent context, but document for users.

issues: React hydration warning: <span> inside <option> in font selects (heading-font-select, body-font-select). Caused by Emergent dev overlay wrapping option text in span. Non-blocking — selects work — but logs a console error. Likely benign in production build.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 505 lines — manageable but consider splitting into routers (auth, content, contact, admin) when adding features.
ACTIVE_TOKENS is a process-local set; tokens reset on supervisor restart. Fine for single-admin demo. If multi-instance deploy is planned, persist or use JWT.
DEFAULT_CONTENT is a large inline dict (~300 lines) — consider moving to a JSON seed file under backend/ for easier editing.
Contact endpoint stores phone/firstName as empty strings when omitted — good. lastName is required + email validated via EmailStr — good.
MongoDB queries correctly use projection {'_id': 0} to avoid ObjectId serialization issues.
test_credentials: Admin password: kyllian2026 (provided in request). No /app/memory/test_credentials.md present.
seed_data_creation: Submitted a TEST_AutomationUser contact message during e2e; the message was visible in admin messages tab. Backend tests create + clean up TEST_ messages.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/test_portfolio_api.py covers all 12 portfolio endpoints (content GET/PUT/reset, settings GET/PUT, login/logout/verify, contact, admin messages list/read/delete). Run: `pytest backend/tests/test_portfolio_api.py -v`. Frontend was tested via Playwright on the production preview URL. All data-testids are present and stable: admin-password-input, admin-login-btn, tab-content, tab-theme, tab-messages, json-editor, heading-font-select, body-font-select, accent-color-input, save-theme-btn, save-content-btn, msg-{id}, input-firstName/lastName/email/phone/message, submit-btn, filter-*, project-*, exp-filter-*. Note: ACTIVE_TOKENS is in-memory — if backend restarts mid-test, re-login.
